title: Parallel Is More Than Faster
topic: Parallelization can either split independent subtasks to run at the same time or run the same task several times to compare or vote on the results.
publishInstruction: For a retry after TikTok/Facebook app permissions and account confirmation are fixed, use --reuse-video with this English videoPath instead of regenerating keyframes, audio, or video. Avoid reposting YouTube unless an intentional duplicate upload is desired.
